description: Dashboard operativo de la sonda HTTP sintetica QoE respaldado por qoe_http_check y qoe_probe_run.

spec.query:
lastPoints = from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: -4h, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_speed_test")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.environment =~ /^${environment:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.probe_id =~ /^${probe_id:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.service == "GenericSpeedTest")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.endpoint_name == "ookla-auto")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field =~ /download_mbps|upload_mbps|latency_ms|server_name|server_location|server_country/)
  |> group(columns: ["probe_id", "site", "environment", "_field"])
  |> last()

pivoted = lastPoints
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["probe_id", "site", "environment"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      probe_id: r.probe_id,
      site: r.site,
      environment: r.environment,
      download_mbps: r.download_mbps,
      upload_mbps: r.upload_mbps,
      latency_ms: r.latency_ms,
      server: if exists r.server_name and exists r.server_location and exists r.server_country then string(v: r.server_name) + " / " + string(v: r.server_location) + " / " + string(v: r.server_country) else if exists r.server_name and exists r.server_location then string(v: r.server_name) + " / " + string(v: r.server_location) else if exists r.server_name then string(v: r.server_name) else ""
    }))
  |> keep(columns: ["probe_id", "site", "environment", "download_mbps", "upload_mbps", "latency_ms", "server"])
  |> sort(columns: ["probe_id"])

pivoted

spec.description: Ultimo snapshot real del lane qoe_speed_test por sonda, con descarga, subida, latencia y servidor seleccionado por la CLI.
spec.title: Snapshot real de speed test

spec.query:
lastData = from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_http_check")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field =~ /time_namelookup_ms|time_connect_ms|time_appconnect_ms|time_starttransfer_ms/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.environment =~ /^${environment:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.probe_id =~ /^${probe_id:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.service =~ /^${service:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.endpoint_name =~ /^${endpoint_name:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field != "time_appconnect_ms" or r._value > 0.0)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: if r._field == "time_namelookup_ms" then "DNS" else if r._field == "time_connect_ms" then "TCP" else if r._field == "time_appconnect_ms" then "TLS" else "TTFB"}))
  |> group(columns: ["service", "_field"])
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, service: r.service, fase: r._field, t: "L", _value: r._value}))

meanData = from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_http_check")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field =~ /time_namelookup_ms|time_connect_ms|time_appconnect_ms|time_starttransfer_ms/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.environment =~ /^${environment:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.probe_id =~ /^${probe_id:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.service =~ /^${service:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.endpoint_name =~ /^${endpoint_name:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field != "time_appconnect_ms" or r._value > 0.0)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: if r._field == "time_namelookup_ms" then "DNS" else if r._field == "time_connect_ms" then "TCP" else if r._field == "time_appconnect_ms" then "TLS" else "TTFB"}))
  |> group(columns: ["service", "_field"])
  |> mean()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, service: r.service, fase: r._field, t: "M", _value: r._value}))

union(tables: [lastData, meanData])
  |> group(columns: [])
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["service", "fase"], columnKey: ["t"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: now(),
      _field: r.service + " - " + r.fase + " (ult:" + (if exists r.L then string(v: int(v: r.L)) else "?") + "ms)",
      _value: (if exists r.L then r.L else 0.0) - (if exists r.M then r.M else 0.0)
    }))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

spec.description: Tarjetas por servicio y fase. Valor principal = Δ (último − promedio). Verde = mejor que el promedio, azul = estable, amarillo/rojo = empeoró.
spec.title: Fases: Δ último vs. promedio

spec.query:
allProbes = from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_http_check")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "available")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.environment =~ /^${environment:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> group(columns: ["probe_id"])
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: now(), _field: r.probe_id, _value: 0.0}))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

activeProbes = from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_http_check")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "available")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.environment =~ /^${environment:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> group(columns: ["probe_id"])
  |> count()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: now(), _field: r.probe_id, _value: 1.0}))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

union(tables: [allProbes, activeProbes])
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> max()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: now(), _field: r._field, _value: r._value}))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

spec.description: Estado actual de cada sonda. 🟢 ON = tuvo medición en los últimos 10 min. 🔴 OFF = sin actividad reciente (pero estuvo activa en las últimas 24h).
spec.title: Estado de sondas

spec.query:
from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_http_check")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "available")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.environment =~ /^${environment:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: if r._value then 100.0 else 0.0}))
  |> group(columns: ["probe_id"])
  |> mean()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: now(), _field: r.probe_id, _value: r._value}))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

spec.description: Porcentaje de checks disponibles (available=true) por sonda en el rango de tiempo seleccionado.
spec.title: Disponibilidad global por sonda

spec.query:
from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_http_check")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "available")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.environment =~ /^${environment:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: if r._value then 1.0 else 0.0}))
  |> group(columns: ["probe_id", "service"])
  |> mean()
  |> group()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      "Sonda": r.probe_id,
      "Servicio": r.service,
      "Disponibilidad %": r._value * 100.0
    }))
  |> keep(columns: ["Sonda", "Servicio", "Disponibilidad %"])
  |> sort(columns: ["Sonda", "Servicio"])

rest.query:
from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_http_check")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "available")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.environment =~ /^${environment:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: if r._value then 1.0 else 0.0}))
  |> group(columns: ["probe_id", "service"])
  |> mean()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      probe_id: r.probe_id,
      service: r.service,
      "Disponibilidad %": r._value * 100.0
    }))
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["probe_id", "service"])

spec.description: Porcentaje de disponibilidad de cada servicio en cada sonda. Detecta servicios caídos o degradados por sonda.
spec.title: Disponibilidad por sonda × servicio

spec.query:
from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_http_check")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "time_total_ms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.environment =~ /^${environment:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> group(columns: ["probe_id"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: count, createEmpty: false)

rest.query:
from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_http_check")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "available")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.environment =~ /^${environment:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> group(columns: ["probe_id"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: count, createEmpty: true)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _field: r.probe_id, _value: float(v: if exists r._value then r._value else 0)}))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

spec.description: Cantidad de mediciones por sonda en cada ventana. Una caída a 0 indica que la sonda dejó de medir.
spec.title: Actividad de sondas en el tiempo

spec.query:
from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_http_check")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "available")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.environment =~ /^${environment:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.probe_id =~ /^${probe_id:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.service =~ /^${service:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.endpoint_name =~ /^${endpoint_name:regex}$/)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: if r._value then 100.0 else 0.0 }))
  |> group(columns: ["service"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

spec.description: Tendencia de disponibilidad por servicio a partir del campo booleano available.
spec.title: Disponibilidad por servicio

spec.query:
from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_http_check")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "time_total_ms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.environment =~ /^${environment:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.probe_id =~ /^${probe_id:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.service =~ /^${service:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.endpoint_name =~ /^${endpoint_name:regex}$/)
  |> group(columns: ["service"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

spec.description: Latencia end-to-end promedio por servicio a partir de time_total_ms.
spec.title: Latencia total por servicio

spec.query:
from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: -30m, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_http_check")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.environment =~ /^${environment:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.probe_id =~ /^${probe_id:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.service =~ /^${service:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.endpoint_name =~ /^${endpoint_name:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field =~ /available|http_status|time_total_ms|error_class|curl_exit_code|remote_ip|effective_url/)
  |> group(columns: ["probe_id", "site", "environment", "service", "_field"])
  |> last()
  |> toString()  
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["probe_id", "site", "environment", "service"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> group(columns: [])
  |> keep(columns: ["probe_id", "site", "environment", "service", "available", "http_status", "time_total_ms", "remote_ip", "effective_url", "error_class", "curl_exit_code"])
  |> sort(columns: ["service"])

spec.description: Ultimo estado por endpoint, incluyendo IP remota y URL efectiva, para identificar que servicio esta fallando ahora.
spec.title: IP de consulta y estado actual

spec.query:
from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_probe_run")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "run_duration_ms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.environment =~ /^${environment:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.probe_id =~ /^${probe_id:regex}$/)
  |> group(columns: ["probe_id"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

spec.description: Tendencia de duracion de ejecucion de la sonda desde qoe_probe_run. Los picos suelen indicar endpoints lentos o problemas de conectividad local.
spec.title: Duracion de ejecucion de la sonda

spec.query:
from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_http_check")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "time_starttransfer_ms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value > 0.0)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.environment =~ /^${environment:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.probe_id =~ /^${probe_id:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.service =~ /^${service:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.endpoint_name =~ /^${endpoint_name:regex}$/)
  |> group(columns: ["service", "endpoint_name"])
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> difference(nonNegative: false, columns: ["_value"], keepFirst: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: if r._value < 0.0 then -1.0 * r._value else r._value }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "service"])
  |> group(columns: [])
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["service"], valueColumn: "_value")

spec.description: Variabilidad de la latencia entre muestras usando la desviacion estandar de time_starttransfer_ms. Es un proxy HTTP, no jitter de red real.
spec.title: Jitter proxy HTTP

title: Resumen HTTP QoE de CX-Radar

spec.definition:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: v.defaultBucket, tag: "environment", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_http_check", start: -30d)
spec.label: Entorno
spec.name: environment

spec.__legacyStringValue:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: v.defaultBucket, tag: "environment", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_http_check", start: -30d)

spec.definition:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: v.defaultBucket, tag: "site", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_http_check" and r.environment =~ /^${environment:regex}$/, start: -30d)
spec.label: Sitio
spec.name: site
